non_blocking: Plural trigger phrases such as follow-ups/code smells/no-ops are not matched by the intentionally narrow regex.
Runtime result/status payload shape should be validated against a real Hermes post_tool_call payload; current behavior fails safe if unrecognized.
Terminal path references and explicit no-issue disclaimers are workflow-level heuristics, not shell/semantic parsing.
Minor potential test additions: patch success evidence, terminal exit_code:0 success, transform note idempotency.
summary: Claude Code v5 approved the final implementation after verifying result/status fail-closed logic, no-clear-success failure behavior, same-turn preservation, absent-turn_id safe reset, unchanged .env blocker scope, clean scans, and passing tests.
